message.content:
{
  "schema_version": "document-card-draft-v1",
  "document_id": "openharmony-docs:zh-cn/application-dev/ui/state-management/arkts-state-management-overview.md",
  "summary": "介绍ArkUI状态管理的基本概念、V1与V2两个版本的区别、各自的装饰器总览及能力对比，帮助开发者理解如何选择和使用状态管理机制来构建动态交互界面。",
  "primary_topics": [
    "状态管理概述",
    "状态管理V1",
    "状态管理V2",
    "装饰器",
    "组件状态",
    "应用状态",
    "深度观察",
    "属性级更新"
  ],
  "important_apis": [
    "@State",
    "@Prop",
    "@Link",
    "@Provide",
    "@Consume",
    "@Observed",
    "@ObjectLink",
    "@Watch",
    "AppStorage",
    "LocalStorage",
    "PersistentStorage",
    "Environment",
    "@ObservedV2",
    "@Trace",
    "@ComponentV2",
    "@Local",
    "@Param",
    "@Once",
    "@Event",
    "@Monitor",
    "@Provider",
    "@Consumer",
    "@Computed",
    "!!语法",
    "$$运算符",
    "AppStorageV2",
    "PersistenceV2",
    "@ReusableV2",
    "openCustomDialog",
    "WithTheme",
    "DialogV2",
    "ProgressButtonV2",
    "SegmentButtonV2"
  ],
  "section_summaries": [
    {
      "section_id": "document-section:sha256:5e8f2a5d89c42a3b2feb3065062467f3efbf73f000132844a42dae7e2d46d8d6",
      "summary": "概述状态管理在ArkUI中的作用，说明状态变量与UI渲染的关系，并指出阅读本文档前需要了解的基础知识。"
    },
    {
      "section_id": "document-section:sha256:299a68c8871b5ea5a8fa8c12a94e78e24eb02e620c7f682b4298be630cd40cee",
      "summary": "介绍状态管理分为V1和V2两个版本，建议新应用使用V2，已使用V1的应用如满足需求则不必立即切换。"
    },
    {
      "section_id": "document-section:sha256:931024d7ffc85eb3737eb9c2bac5be34f83ed174cb78a1282e3f2b3ec407c73e",
      "summary": "说明状态管理V1的整体框架，包括组件级和应用级装饰器的分类，以及相关功能。"
    },
    {
      "section_id": "document-section:sha256:c82383e119ec34fe6954f7c894a7fd5eec982055d61a3a4615852b9d2956bfa8",
      "summary": "列举V1中管理组件内状态和应用级状态的装饰器，如@State、@Prop、@Link、@Provide/@Consume、@Observed/@ObjectLink，以及AppStorage、LocalStorage等，并说明其作用。"
    },
    {
      "section_id": "document-section:sha256:c3bad4df65445b308c610254bd95d1d8f694d987e5de2cf3630bc907d41ab5a2",
      "summary": "介绍V1中的其他功能，包括@Watch监听状态变化和$$运算符实现双向绑定。"
    },
    {
      "section_id": "document-section:sha256:a0a5e6024a4b9ba2098591b26c444bbfbe32ff68b09da67d3517fa54d5f240b8",
      "summary": "提供状态管理V1的相关实例链接，供开发者参考。"
    },
    {
      "section_id": "document-section:sha256:896d408f55cacedb46ab99b2602a35f1237841d0179ab624c06e27d49a28061e",
      "summary": "介绍状态管理V2的增强特性，包括V1的现状与V2的优点、V2的装饰器总览以及V1与V2的能力对比。"
    },
    {
      "section_id": "document-section:sha256:cdc6348f3aeca804a4a28896f5584605996ab443cb0c923848aa9f1fab0913b3",
      "summary": "分析状态管理V1的局限性，如无法深度观察、冗余更新等，并说明V2如何通过数据本身可观察、深度观测、属性级更新等优点解决这些问题。"
    },
    {
      "section_id": "document-section:sha256:dda6c51a9ab712c15811028fc680d2307fc80a5c91cbfbc87ae997760516536f",
      "summary": "列出V2的全新装饰器，如@ObservedV2、@Trace、@ComponentV2、@Local、@Param、@Event、@Monitor、@Provider/@Consumer、@Computed和!!语法，并简要说明其用途。"
    },
    {
      "section_id": "document-section:sha256:e88a10e2fc4eac1918a59c88c00e5fdc96522e109a87f6dde71a0bd371dd342e",
      "summary": "以表格形式对比V1和V2在装饰器、生命周期、双向绑定、自定义弹窗、主题等方面的能力差异，并提及迁移指导和混用场景。"
    }
  ]
}
